ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, TSLA) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price on the specified date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price on the specified date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price on the specified date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for corporate actions */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the specified date */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "post_market_close" REAL /* Post-market closing price */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "trading_value" TEXT /* Total trading value for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily price record */,
  "oc_high" REAL /* Opening to closing high price trend */,
  "oc_low" REAL /* Opening to closing low price trend */,
  "oc_high_trend" REAL /* Calculated trend value for high prices */,
  "oc_low_trend" REAL /* Calculated trend value for low prices */,
  "trend_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trend in days */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength of the trend (e.g., 1.0 for strong, 0.5 for weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES daily_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred stock alerts, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, inactive) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trading session in minutes */,
  "volume_traded" TEXT /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "value_traded" TEXT /* Total value traded during the session */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "last_value" REAL /* Last recorded value of the index */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute change in the index value */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the index */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume traded for the index */,
  "number_of_stocks" INTEGER /* Number of stocks in the index */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend paid */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date for the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividends (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the dividend */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Payable date for the dividend */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the stock for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the average price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price for the year */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price for the year */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume traded for the year */,
  "number_of_trading_days" INTEGER /* Number of trading days in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
